title: crotalaria distans subsp. macaulayae
intro: Crotalaria distans subsp. macaulayae is a plant species classified under the pea family (Fabaceae) and is commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria distans subsp. macaulayae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antioxidant, thereby offering protection against oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
